[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up, low-resolution image shows a skull-like face above a bold, partially pixelated phrase on a dark background.

Main Subject:
The main visual focus is a pale skull-like face with dark eye sockets and a wide, rectangular mouth, centered near the top. Below it, large white text reads “DUH GUSTI” with a small, blocky yellow graphic to the right.

Setting:
The background is dark and indistinct, with a reddish-brown curved area behind the skull-like face; the overall scene looks like a stylized graphic rather than a real environment.

Visual Details:
The skull-like image appears bright and high-contrast compared to the dark backdrop. The text is rendered in thick, uppercase white letters with a black outline, and the lower-right area includes a pixelated yellow shape with teal and black blocks. The image has a pixelated, compressed look and an overall blurry/soft focus.

Visible Text:
DUH GUSTI

Practical Summary:
The image is a stylized graphic featuring a skull-like face above large white text. A pixelated yellow graphic appears to the right of the words.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
